subcodes.first_line: O Thou Whose mercy hath preceded all things, Whose grace hath encompassed all who dwell on earth and in heaven, and by Whose Name fruits have been brought forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سبقت رحمتک علی کل الاشیا و فضلک احاط من فی الارض و السما و باسمک اثمرت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
